description_long: This is a large, cylindrical vertical storage tank elevated on a framework of metal support legs. The tank features a conical roof with a central vent or hatch at the top, and a visible access ladder with a safety cage running up one side, leading to a small platform. The exterior appears to be constructed from corrugated or ribbed metal panels, providing structural strength and durability. There are several pipes attached to the tank, including a prominent inlet or outlet pipe running from the roof to the side, likely for filling or emptying the contents. The base of the tank is open, supported by a network of metal struts, allowing for easy inspection and maintenance underneath. The overall design is utilitarian, optimized for bulk storage of liquids or granular materials in an industrial or urban setting.
description: A large, cylindrical metal storage tank with a conical roof, support legs, access ladder, and attached pipes, designed for bulk storage in industrial or urban environments.
description_view_0: The tank is seen with the access ladder and safety cage prominently visible, along with the top vent and a side pipe attachment.
description_view_1: This view highlights the full length of the access ladder and safety cage, as well as the platform at the top, with the conical roof clearly visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the tank shows the main pipe attachment running from the roof to the side, with the support legs and open base structure visible.
description_view_3: The access ladder and safety cage are fully in view, with the cylindrical body and conical roof dominating the profile.
